name: XFlex Golf and Fitness
about: XFlex Golf is a performance-driven indoor golf training facility in Devon, PA, focused on complete game improvement. It combines PGA professional instruction with Titleist Performance Institute (TPI) golf fitness movement screening and advanced indoor practice and play options. The facility utilizes GSPro simulator technology with Foresight launch monitor hardware to help golfers train smarter and improve year-round. Memberships and individual packages are designed to fit each golfer's goals, offering access to golf lessons, fitness training, and simulator bay time.
why_golfers_like_it: Integration of TPI-certified fitness with high-tech simulation
Access to 500+ virtual courses on GSPro simulator
Expert instruction from PGA Professional Hugh Reilly
Advanced data tracking with Foresight launch monitors and OnForm video analysis

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of an on-site kitchen or food service.
BYOB is permitted for certain events like the Valentine's Day 9 & Dine.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium photometric camera launch monitor used for precise club and ball data tracking.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers should bring their own clubs as no rental service is mentioned.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is permitted for certain events like the Valentine's Day 9 & Dine. There is no mention of food service, so bringing your own is likely recommended.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time is not specified, but as an indoor simulator experience, it would be significantly faster than a traditional round, likely around 2-3 hours depending on the course and simulator pace.

faq.question: Is XFlex Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is kid-friendly, offering junior team training, adult clinics, and programs designed for golfers of all ages and skill levels.
